29.reason: [Loop bound should be `p < i`, not `p < i+1`, because `i` is the count of terms after the loop ends; using `i+1` accesses uninitialized memory]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.2 , reason:  [Loop bound should be `p < i`, not `p < i+1`, because `i` is the count of terms after the loop ends; using `i+1` accesses uninitialized memory]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.2 , reason:  [Loop bound should be `p < i`, not `p < i+1`, because `i` is the count of terms after the loop ends (last valid index is i-1). Using i+1 accesses uninitialized memory.]
